page_metadata.biotools__summary: Juxtapose is a Python tool that can be used to compare gene co-expression networks (GCNs). Juxtapose, together with different similarity measures, can be utilized for comparative transcriptomics between a set of organisms.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Juxtapose is a Python tool that can be used to compare gene co-expression networks (GCNs). Juxtapose, together with different similarity measures, can be utilized for comparative transcriptomics between a set of organisms.
